ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the department manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the department's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager's information was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agile_readiness" (
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Agile readiness assessment */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department being assessed */,
  "business_skill" TEXT /* Availability of business skills within the department */,
  "technical_readiness" TEXT /* Technical readiness of the department's systems and processes */,
  "scheduling_status" TEXT /* Current status of the department's approach to scheduling and project management */,
  "suitability_for_agile" TEXT /* Overall suitability for Agile methodologies */,
  "staff_availability" TEXT /* Availability of staff for Agile training and implementation */,
  "technical_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the department's technical systems and processes */,
  "operational_stability" TEXT /* Stability of the department's operational requirements */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the readiness assessment was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the readiness assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agile_readiness_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agile_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Agile coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the Agile coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the Agile coach */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the coach is assigned to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the Agile coach */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's information was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agile_coaches_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agile_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Agile project */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the project is initiated */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the Agile project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the Agile project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Lead responsible for the Agile project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agile_projects_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agile_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Agile project the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, quality, efficiency) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agile_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES agile_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member within the department */,
  "agile_training" TEXT /* Status of Agile training completed by the staff member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member's information was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agile_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Agile intervention */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department receiving the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for the intervention */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agile_interventions_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department involved in the collaboration */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Agile coach involved in the collaboration */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department manager involved in the collaboration */,
  "it_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IT team involved in the collaboration */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the collaboration meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration meeting */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the collaboration meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location where the collaboration meeting took place */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees at the collaboration meeting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration event was created or recorded in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration event's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
